attributes.name: Physical Enhancement
attributes.description:
* Obtain 1 [Physical Boost] stack every 2 second when there is an enemy within the nearby 100 range

* Up to 5 stacks

* Final Skill Damage increases by 8% per 1 [Physical Boost] stack

* 1 [Physical Boost] stack decreases when hit

(1 stack decreases by 0.2 seconds even when hit multiple times)

attributes.name: Vipashyana: Spot Chance
attributes.description:
* [Muscle Pump] buff is applied by 7% chance when attacking the enemy with [Strong Fist], [Leg Trip], [Point Kick], [Break Mountain], [Sudden Kick], and [Flying Kick]

(Counted once even when hit multiple times)

* Cooldown is not applied when using [Surging Wave] during [Muscle Pump] buff

* If [Surging Wave] is already during cooldown, it is reset

attributes.name: [Arts] Glide: Spurt
attributes.description: * Damage received decrease effect is removed and Cooldown of [Langon] is reset

attributes.name: [Arts] Shamatha: Recovery
attributes.description: * Recovers HP, SP by 0.5% per 1 stack of [Fist], [Kick] removed by Shamatha
